Name: [AWARENESS] <Company> - <Brief topic> (Field: <Rep name>)
Description: Owner: CE | Replace placeholder with actual company and topic

Name: Confirm session date & logistics with field rep
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: ASAP | Confirm date / time / format (in-person or virtual) and attendee list with field rep

Name: Assign Opstree architect
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 1 | Identify and confirm availability of relevant Opstree architect for the session

Name: Align on demo scope / key messages
Description: Owner: CE + Opstree | Timing: 2 days before session | Agree on GCA demo flow and key messages tailored to the customer audience

Name: [GOAL TRACKING] Session Delivered - <Company> awareness session
Description: Owner: CE + Opstree | Timing: Session date | Mark complete when session is delivered. This task is counted by Asana Goal 5 (Awareness Sessions). Opstree Lead must be set on the parent task.

Name: Capture interest signals & attendee list
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Day after | Log attendee names and interest level observed during session

Name: Follow-up email to field rep with next steps
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Day after | Share session summary and recommended next steps with the field rep

Name: Decision: Promote to Pre-Sales / No Interest / TBD
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Within 1 week | Update Stage field: if interested move to Pre-Sales; if not set Outcome = No Interest and move to Closed
